chains.name: Sales/Order-to-Cash chain

steps.notes: INDEX.md Modules table has row: [sales](modules/sales.md) → 'Dealer/customer management, order lifecycle, credit controls, dispatch coordination, dealer self-service, and canonical O2C path'
sales.md Cross-References section links to [docs/flows/order-to-cash.md](../flows/order-to-cash.md) as 'canonical order-to-cash flow (behavioral entrypoint)'

order-to-cash.md Section 10 Related Documentation links to [docs/adrs/ADR-006-portal-and-host-boundary-separation.md] as 'Portal/host boundary separation (enforces /api/v1/dealer-portal/** vs /api/v1/portal/** isolation)'
order-to-cash.md Section 10 Related Documentation links to [docs/frontend-handoff-commercial.md] as 'Commercial frontend handoff (sales, O2C, payloads, RBAC)'

order-to-cash.md Section 10 Related Documentation links to [docs/deprecated/INDEX.md] as 'Deprecated surfaces registry (legacy paths, replacement notes)'. Deprecated/INDEX.md contains 'Sales and Order-to-Cash' section listing deprecated surfaces including GET /api/v1/sales/dealers, legacy idempotency key resolution, legacy order statuses, and POST /api/v1/sales/promotions with replacement notes.

chains.notes: Full chain verified: INDEX.md → sales.md → order-to-cash.md → ADR-006 → frontend-handoff-commercial.md → deprecated/INDEX.md. Every link resolves. The deprecated index contains a dedicated 'Sales and Order-to-Cash' section with replacement notes.

chains.name: Inventory chain

steps.notes: INDEX.md Modules table has row: [inventory](modules/inventory.md) → 'Stock truth boundary: stock summaries, batches, adjustments, opening stock import, valuation, traceability, dispatch execution, and inventory–accounting event bridge'
inventory.md Cross-References section links to [docs/flows/inventory-management.md](../flows/inventory-management.md) as 'canonical inventory management flow (behavioral entrypoint)'

inventory-management.md Section 8 references 'See [orchestrator.md](../modules/orchestrator.md) for the full event bridge map'. The inventory flow itself cross-references to the ADR index via the related docs. The adrs/INDEX.md links to ADR-003-outbox-pattern-for-cross-module-events.md which covers the outbox pattern for inventory event publishing. File verified at docs/adrs/ADR-003-outbox-pattern-for-cross-module-events.md — it references inventory events, InventoryMovementEvent, and the event bridge.

inventory-management.md Section 10 Related Documentation links to [docs/frontend-handoff-operations.md] as 'Operations frontend handoff (inventory payloads, RBAC)'. The frontend-handoff-operations.md Section 1 references inventory.md as canonical doc and contains full inventory route table.

inventory-management.md Section 10 Related Documentation links to [docs/deprecated/INDEX.md] as 'Deprecated surfaces registry (legacy dispatch paths, raw-material intake toggle)'. Deprecated/INDEX.md contains an 'Inventory Management' section listing legacy dispatch confirm path and legacy raw-material intake endpoints with replacement notes.

chains.notes: Full chain verified: INDEX.md → inventory.md → inventory-management.md → ADR-003 (via adrs/INDEX.md) → frontend-handoff-operations.md → deprecated/INDEX.md. Every link resolves. The deprecated index contains a dedicated 'Inventory Management' section with replacement notes.

chains.name: HR/Payroll chain

steps.notes: INDEX.md Modules table has row: [hr](modules/hr.md) → 'Employees, leave, attendance, payroll runs, and payroll posting/payment'
hr.md Cross-references section links to [docs/flows/hr-payroll.md](../flows/hr-payroll.md) as 'canonical HR/payroll flow (behavioral entrypoint)'

hr-payroll.md Section 10 'Relevant ADRs' links to [ADR-004-layered-audit-surfaces.md](../adrs/ADR-004-layered-audit-surfaces.md) as 'Audit trail layers (payroll posting creates audit markers in accounting)'. File verified — ADR-004 covers the three audit surfaces including accounting event store used by payroll.

hr-payroll.md Section 10 Related Documentation links to [docs/frontend-handoff-finance.md] as 'Finance frontend handoff (HR/payroll payloads, RBAC)'. The frontend-handoff-finance.md Section 1 references hr.md and hr-payroll flow as canonical docs and contains full HR/Payroll route table.

hr-payroll.md Section 10 Related Documentation links to [docs/deprecated/INDEX.md] as 'Deprecated surfaces registry (legacy /hr/payroll-runs endpoints)'. Deprecated/INDEX.md contains an 'HR and Payroll' section listing GET /api/v1/hr/payroll-runs, POST /api/v1/hr/payroll-runs, and other /hr/** endpoints as deprecated with replacement notes pointing to /api/v1/payroll/**.

chains.notes: Full chain verified: INDEX.md → hr.md → hr-payroll.md → ADR-004 → frontend-handoff-finance.md → deprecated/INDEX.md. Every link resolves. The deprecated index contains a dedicated 'HR and Payroll' section with replacement notes.

summary: All 3 end-to-end navigation chains verified successfully (PASS). Starting from docs/INDEX.md, a reader can navigate to a module packet, then to its major flow packet, then to related ADRs and frontend handoff packets, and finally to deprecated replacement notes. Every link in every chain resolves to an existing file with expected content. Total links verified: 15 (5 per chain × 3 chains). No broken links found. No missing cross-references detected.
